steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content:
Before the blank: Kizomba...has become an international phenomenon — a complete independent clause.
After the blank: In 2022, the Indian dance duo...defeated performers... — a second complete independent clause.

Two independent clauses must be separated by terminal punctuation (or a semicolon).

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
Choice B uses a period: phenomenon. In — correctly ending the first sentence and beginning a new one.

A is awkward and mis-attaches 2022. C creates a comma splice. D omits punctuation entirely.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
